title: Infosys Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Infosys Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Infosys Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Infosys Advisory Limited:
Infosys Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys Advisory Limited!
